context.userMessage: Approved. Go ahead with the plan.

rationale: Client-side JS for the sailing weather app — Leaflet map, boat marker, weather animations, compass rose, and timeline slider.
implementation: Self-contained IIFE. Initializes Leaflet with dark tiles, creates animated boat SVG marker, renders wind/rain particles on a Canvas overlay, builds interactive compass rose from API data, and provides a timeline slider for forecast scrubbing. All units displayed in nautical/metric (kn, °C, hPa, m).
